title: In-chat payment event notifications
description: When a payment state transition occurs (request received, address sent, tx sent, confirmed), print a notification line in the chat display. Format: [payment] alice requests 0.01 ZEC / [payment] address sent / [payment] tx abc123 broadcast / [payment] 0.01 ZEC confirmed from alice. These appear inline in the message stream.
close_reason: display_name()+ZEC amount added to all [pay] notifications; malformed-amount/dust error messages added; 4 new display_name tests; 276 tests pass; clippy clean
